name: Super Tupper Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flour in Tupperware Fix-In-Mix bowl.
2. In the center, make a well with a spoon.
3. Scald milk and cool with water.
4. Add sugar, salt, eggs, and yeast to the well.
5. Pour liquid into the well. Do not stir!
6. Seal and whisper air; wait until the seal pops off (about 15 minutes).
7. Melt oleo and pour into the bowl; mix gently.
8. Add more flour if needed.
9. Knead to proper consistency.
10. Seal, whisper air again; wait until the seal pops (about 45 minutes).
11. Knead and roll out. Makes 3 loaves.
12. Let rise in loaf pans for 20 to 30 minutes.
13. Bake at 350°F until brown, about 20 to 30 minutes.
Note: All ingredients should be at room temperature. Hints:
- Use some of the dough for buns and cinnamon rolls.
- For cinnamon rolls, add (1 cup sugar, 1 or 2 teaspoons cinnamon, and 1/4 cup margarine) over the dough; roll into a log, slice, and bake.
